title: The city's 2020 spring project observation group visited our company's Tianhui Plastic E-commerce Industrial Park
contentHtml: On the morning of April 24, an inspection group of more than 100 people, led by Qinhuangdao Municipal Party Committee Secretary Zhu Zhengxue and Qinhuangdao Mayor Zhang Ruishu, led the municipal leadership class, the main responsible comrades of the Fourth Inspection Team of Hebei Province, and the main responsible comrades of the party and government of each county (district), visited the Tianhui Plastic E-commerce Industrial Park project under construction by our company.
titleZh: 全市2020年春季项目观摩团参观我公司天晖塑料电商产业园
contentHtmlZh: 4月24日上午，由秦皇岛市市委书记朱政学、秦皇岛市市长张瑞书带领市领导班、河北省第四督查组主要负责同志、各县（区）党政主要负责同志组成的100余人的考察观摩团，参观了我公司正在施工的天晖塑料电商产业园项目。
